title: Automatic translation of tasks
excerpt:
Hi, 
We have onboarded an investor who does not speak English well, only Hebrew. 
Do you have plugins or extentions that can translate tasks and content in general for that person? 
Thx in advance 
Peter

posts.author: peterdewitte (Peter)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

We have onboarded an investor who does not speak English well, only Hebrew.

Do you have plugins or extentions that can translate tasks and content in general for that person?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Have you tried using an AI column? It can translate data from other columns and/or the updates
